amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Article 58 — paragraph 2 (new)
body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Article 58 — paragraph 2 (new)

## Text proposed by the Commission

*(no text)*

## Amendment of the European Parliament

The membership of the advisory forum shall represent a balanced selection of stakeholders, including industry, start-ups, SMEs, civil society, the social partners and academia. The membership of the advisory forum shall be balanced with regard to commercial and non-commercial interests and, within the category of commercial interests, with regards to SMEs and other undertakings.
parliament_text: The membership of the advisory forum shall represent a balanced selection of stakeholders, including industry, start-ups, SMEs, civil society, the social partners and academia. The membership of the advisory forum shall be balanced with regard to commercial and non-commercial interests and, within the category of commercial interests, with regards to SMEs and other undertakings.
